query:
SELECT
            u.id AS "id!: uuid::Uuid",
            u.email AS "email!: String",
            u.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name' AS "display_name: String"
        FROM auth.users u
        JOIN auth.identities i
            ON i.user_id = u.id
            AND i.provider = 'sso:' || $1::uuid::text
        WHERE u.id = $2
